query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_guides,
  SUM(CASE WHEN latitude IS NOT NULL AND longitude IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as guides_with_coordinates,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN latitude IS NOT NULL AND longitude IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) as coverage_percentage
FROM island_guides

  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN latitude IS NOT NULL AND longitude IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) as coverage_percentage
FROM island_guides
